arts.ttl: Lazio vs Como | Serie A | Team News & Probable Lineups
arts.sum: Lazio will be looking to put their Derby della Capitale behind them when they host Como in the opening fixture of the Serie A weekend. The clash will take place at the Stadio Olimpico in Rome. It kicks off on Friday, 20:45 local time. arts.ttl: Como Coach Fabregas Previews Lazio match and Addresses New Signings: “Both Diao and Butez are Available”
arts.sum: As Como prepare for their crucial match against Lazio at the Stadio Olimpico, head coach Cesc Fabregas is optimistic about the team's chances, especially with the recent additions of Assane Diao and Jean Butez. Fabregas expressed his enthusiasm, stating, "Both players will be available for selection, and we are very happy to have them on board." arts.ttl: Serie A | Lazio v Como: Match Preview
arts.sum: Lazio will be aiming to bounce back from a disappointing derby defeat as they host Como at the Stadio Olimpico on Friday evening. The Biancocelesti's recent form has been inconsistent, with just seven points from their last six Serie A matches, while Como have shown signs of improvement in their battle against relegation.
